question: The scatterplot chart portrays the income and ages of a group of people. Which of the following statements best reflects what can be concluded from the chart?

options.A: It is clear that individuals between ages 65 and 70 have the highest annual earnings.
options.B: It is clear that individuals between ages 60 and 65 have the highest annual earnings.
options.C: The individual data points are too small and close together to determine which specific age range has the highest annual earnings.
options.D: Individuals between ages 55 and 60 clearly have the highest annual earnings.

explanation: The individuals in the chart between the ages of 65 and 70 have the highest annual. The small size of the chart may cause difficulty in accurately identifying the specific trends of annual in certain age ranges.
